SELECT toUInt16OrDefault(value, CAST('0', 'UInt16')) AS converted_value FROM test_table;
SELECT toUInt16OrDefault(value, CAST('100', 'UInt16')) AS result FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE '0%' AND value NOT LIKE '%abc%';
SELECT (SELECT toUInt16OrDefault(value, CAST('0', 'UInt16')) FROM test_table) AS subquery_result, COUNT(*) FROM test_table;
SELECT toUInt16OrDefault(sum(value), CAST('0', 'UInt16')) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value NOT LIKE '%abc%') GROUP BY value;
